title: Translucent Doors
description: See-through doors with a clean vanilla look. 🚪✨
body:
![Translucent Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6decc8c0bd9b7a13db4cfc30cf6c12bd2b67a8de_0.webp)

✨ Translucent Doors completely changes the way doors look in Minecraft!

This texture pack adds translucent doors, allowing you to see what’s on the other side without opening them. The result is a more modern, clean, and functional look, perfect for detailed builds and more realistic houses.

Each door type keeps its original identity, but now features transparent or hollow details, blending style and practicality. Ideal for players who enjoy open, bright builds with a touch of elegance.

🔹 Clean and immersive visuals
🔹 Keeps the vanilla Minecraft style
🔹 Perfect for houses, villages, and modern builds
🔹 Compatible with other texture packs
